introSection:
Crazy Car is a Maurer Rides built sit-down launched roller coaster located at Happy Valley. It is identical to Formule X at Drievliet Family Park.

From 2013 to 2016, the ride was known as FamilyCo Express.
fullText:
Crazy Car is a Maurer Rides built sit-down launched roller coaster located at Happy Valley. It is identical to Formule X at Drievliet Family Park.

From 2013 to 2016, the ride was known as FamilyCo Express.
